articles.title: Here’s why a trade for Brian Thomas Jr. would be a home run move for the Patriots
articles.description:
Thomas might have had a down year in 2025, but he has major upside if he becomes available.

The post Here’s why a trade for Brian Thomas Jr. would be a home run move for the Patriots appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots eye trade for Brian Thomas Jr. to enhance their roster.
Thomas, despite a down 2025 season, shows significant potential for improvement.
Acquiring Thomas could boost Patriots' performance in upcoming NFL seasons.
